subcodes.first_line: O attracted leaves! Blessed indeed are ye, who, like unto valiant men, have been captivated in the path of the All-Glorious [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقات منجذبه خوشا بحال شما که چون رجال در سبیل ذوالجلال گرفتار گردیدید و
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @poems and quotation from poetry
